footer.about: The leading B2B marketplace between factories and traders: list wholesale products, negotiate directly with buyers, and close deals safely—with shipping follow-up and payment protection at every step.

subscriptionsPage.title: Subscribe with us!
subscriptionsPage.activeBody: Continue training and tests from your dashboard.
subscriptionsPage.trialTitle: You are on a free trial
subscriptionsPage.faqEmpty: No subscription or payment FAQs are available yet.
subscriptionsPage.taxNote: Prices shown are exclusive of tax

trialTest.title: Full practice test
trialTest.subtitle: Try a complete test that mirrors the real exam experience

features.description: A comprehensive test covering all topics
A timed session like the real exam
In-depth analysis of your performance and results

instructions: The test has 24 questions from different topics and difficulty levels
You have 45 minutes to complete the test
You can move between questions during the test
When time runs out, your answers will be submitted automatically
You will get a detailed report when you finish
trialTest.tip: Tip: make sure you have enough time and a distraction-free space before you start
trialTest.startError: Could not start the test. Sign in and check your subscription or free trial.

examResult.intro: This was a practice run. Keep training to improve — review mistakes and use explanations to close gaps.
examResult.noteBody: Good effort. If you need more practice, keep working through topics and questions until you feel confident for the real exam.
examResult.correctHint: Nice work on what you got right

photo.hint: Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP — up to 10 MB
photo.uploadFail: Upload failed. Check your connection and sign-in.

progress.title: Progress by subject

mistakes.title: Questions you missed
